text: حَضَرْتُ أَنَا وَ أَبُو شِبْلٍ عِنْدَ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَسَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ هَذِهِ الْمَسَائِلِ فِي الدِّيَاتِ ثُمَّ سَأَلَ أَبُو شِبْلٍ وَ كَانَ أَشَدَّ مُبَالَغَةً فَخَلَّيْتُهُ حَتَّى اسْتَنْظَفَ .

en.hubeali: Salih Bin Iqba, from Yunus Al Shaybani who said,

‘I and Abu Shibl were present in the presence of Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, so I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about these questions regarding the wergild. The Abu Shibl asked, and he was speaking intensely about it. So I left him until he grasped it’.
